nasb.text: The singers went on, the musicians after them, In the midst of the maidens beating tambourines.

esv.text: the singers in front, the musicians last, between them virgins playing tambourines:

cnv.text: 歌唱的在前頭行，作樂的走在後面， 中間還有擊鼓的少女。

ccb.text: 歌唱的在前，奏乐的殿后， 摇手鼓的少女居中。

csbs.text: 歌唱的在前，弹琴的随后， 击鼓的童贞女在中间。
